text: On 'SNL,' Matt Damon's Brett Kavanaugh promises a third Trump term - USA Today
fullText: Matt Damon revived his impression of Brett Kavanaugh on this week's "SNL," with the Supreme Court justice promising to "let Trump do a third term."

text: Sen. Mark Kelly says Trump administration's $1.5 trillion Pentagon budget request is "outrageous" - CBS News
fullText: Democratic Sen. Mark Kelly of Arizona said the Trump administration's $1.5 trillion budget request for defense spending is "outrageous."

text: Sandra Bullock Shares Ultra Rare Image of Her Kids in Mother’s Day Tribute - E! News
fullText: Sandra Bullock shared a rare image of her two children Louis and Laila in a Mother’s Day tribute, throwing it back to when her kids were toddlers.

text: The number of steps you need to walk a day to maintain weight loss — no, it’s not 10,000 - New York Post
fullText: While 10,000 steps is sold as the magic number to achieve weight loss, science says we should aim for different digits.

text: Live updates: Iran says it has responded to US proposal for ending war - CNN
fullText: Iran has sent its response to the latest US proposal for ending the conflict that began at the end of February, according to state media. Follow for live updates.

text: Energy secretary says Trump administration is open to suspending gas tax amid soaring prices - NBC News
fullText: Energy Secretary Chris Wright told NBC News’ “Meet the Press” on Sunday that the Trump administration is “open to all ideas” to lower the cost of gas, including suspending the federal gas tax

text: 2026 NBA Draft order, lottery odds: No. 1 pick to be awarded on Sunday - CBS Sports

text: Lawyers for the global elite aren’t buying Trump’s gold card visa - The Washington Post
fullText: Even Melania’s former lawyer is warning people away from Trump’s program designed to make immigration easier for the wealthy.

text: Apple to Make Design Changes in macOS 27 to Address Tahoe Quirks - Bloomberg

text: Poll: Americans disagree on what a ‘stolen’ election means - Politico
fullText: New results from The POLITICO Poll show Democrats are worried about voter suppression while Republicans are worried about voter fraud.

text: Cricut’s $99 craft cutting machine helped me feel creative again - The Verge
fullText: The Joy 2 is an affordable, capable machine for cutting and drawing crafts at home. However, its companion app isn’t as beginner-friendly as Cricut claims.

text: Meet the YouTube whisperers, a booming class of advisors behind MrBeast and other million-dollar channels - CNBC
fullText: A burgeoning group of YouTube strategists are charging big money to YouTubers who want to expand their popularity.

text: Keir Starmer's party lost big in U.K. local elections. Here’s what comes next. - NPR
fullText: U.K. Prime Minister Keir Starmer's Labour party suffered major losses in local elections held across Britain last week. So far, Starmer has rejected calls for his resignation.

text: FDA claims there’s no estrogen patch shortage as women struggle to get prescriptions filled - NBC News
fullText: The Food and Drug Administration removed the black box warning from hormone replacement therapies late last year, and recently, the most insured type, the estrogen patch, has been in short supply amid a boom in the therapy’s popularity.

text: Target is trying to win back busy families from Walmart, starting with the baby aisle - CNBC
Book excerpt: "Torched" by Jonathan Vigliotti - Yahoo
fullText: In his new book, the CBS News correspondent writes of the warning posed by the inadequate response to last year's catastrophic wildfires that destroyed thousands of homes and businesses in Southern California – as well as to the daunting task of rebuilding.
